title: SR 13-6 / CA 13-3: Supervisory Letter SR 13-6 / CA 13-3 on         Supervisory Practices Regarding Banking Organizations and their Borrowers and Other Customers Affected by a Major Disaster or Emergency  -- March 29, 2013
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 13-6 / CA 13-3 on         Supervisory Practices Regarding Banking Organizations and their Borrowers and Other Customers Affected by a Major Disaster or Emergency  -- March 29, 2013
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 13-6 / CA 13-3
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations: This letter applies to all state member banks, bank holding companies, savings and loan holding companies, and U.S. offices of foreign banking organizations, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICERS IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND BANKING ORGANIZATIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE
bm25_text: SR 13-6 / CA 13-3 Supervisory Letter SR 13-6 / CA 13-3 on         Supervisory Practices Regarding Banking Organizations and their Borrowers and Other Customers Affected by a Major Disaster or Emergency  -- March 29, 2013 to Community Banking Organizations: This letter applies to all state member banks, bank holding companies, savings and loan holding companies, and U.S. offices of foreign banking organizations, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION DIVISION OF CONSUMERAND COMMUNITY AFFAIRS TO THE OFFICERS IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND BANKING ORGANIZATIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE SUBJECT:
